name: fleetdeck
description: Fleet Deck — localhost daemon + board that makes every Claude Code session on a machine visible. Tested against Claude Code 2.1.206.
author: Luis Morales <luismmorales@gmail.com>

scripts.bundle:
esbuild scripts/fleetd/fleetd.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=scripts/fleetd/fleetd.bundle.mjs --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate --banner:js="// GENERATED by 'npm run bundle' — do not edit. Source: scripts/fleetd/*.mjs
import { createRequire as __cr } from 'node:module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build:board: cd board && npm install && npm run build
